findings.issue: Open financial debt: $150 lost on duplicate 83(b) filing via DHL due to assumption that Stripe Atlas didn't auto-file. CEO has not closed DEBT-001.
findings.recommended_fix: Verify Stripe Atlas coverage in onboarding docs; add pre-check 'VERIFY STRIPE ATLAS STATUS FIRST' to obligations.

findings.issue: Activation gap in swarm: 13 perspectives registered but `packages/swarm/agents/` is empty. Learning doesn’t persist. Architecture is sound, implementation broken.
findings.recommended_fix: Complete 6-phase terminal handoff to rebuild agents with persistent memory and weights.

findings.issue: Sprint backlog includes 'Build profile completion meter' — violates LAW 3 (shame-free language) via 'X% complete' framing.
findings.recommended_fix: Replace with completion celebration only after full submission; never display progress %.

perspectives.whistleblower_flag: Sprint task violates Foundation Law 3 — shame-based UX in development. Must halt.

findings.issue: Open financial debt (230 AZN) from duplicate 83(b) filing not resolved. Violates Class 21 — recurring financial loss without ledger enforcement.
findings.recommended_fix: Close DEBT-001 with CEO confirmation. Enforce append-only ledger updates on every instance wake.

findings.issue: 7 pending tasks in work-queue, including hardened migration verification and prod smoke tests. Risk of false completion (Class 7) if not E2E-verified.
findings.recommended_fix: Run prod_smoke_e2e.py for each. Log results to zeus.governance_events.

findings.issue: Sprint backlog includes UI changes without NEVER RED (LAW 1) and ANIMATION SAFETY (LAW 4) checks. High risk of shame-inducing patterns (LAW 3).
findings.recommended_fix: Audit all UI tasks against Constitution v1.7 Part 1 before implementation.

findings.issue: Deferred items include unvalidated input handling in /api/skills endpoint. Potential OWASP A1:2021 — Broken Access Control.
findings.recommended_fix: Implement RLS policy enforcement and input sanitization before skill execution.

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Ecosystem Auditor", "findings": [{"severity": "P0", "file_or_area": "ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md", "issue": "Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) missing in 4/5 products. Validate agent responses against live code post-index."}, {"severity": "P1", "file_or_area": "docs/ECOSYSTEM-CONSTITUTION.md", "issue": "Crystal Law 6 Amendment unimplemented in BrandedBy: badges shown immediately post-assessment, violating 'no immediate contingent reward' rule.", "recommended_fix": "Delay badge reveal by minimum 2h or until unrelated user action. findings.issue: Law 2 (Energy Adaptation) missing in 4/5 products. Only MindShift implements it. Violates Foundation Law compliance across ecosystem.
findings.recommended_fix: Audit all product codebases for Energy Adaptation logic. Implement fallback heuristic in ZEUS, Life Simulator, BrandedBy, VOLAURA within 72h.

findings.issue: Code-index older than 7 days (last update: 2026-04-21). Agents are simulating without current context. CRITICAL per audit protocol.
findings.recommended_fix: Reindex immediately using CLI job `atlas-reindex --full`. Validate agent responses against live code post-index.

findings.issue: Crystal Law 6 Amendment unimplemented in BrandedBy: badges shown immediately post-assessment, violating 'no immediate contingent reward' rule.
findings.recommended_fix: Delay badge reveal by minimum 2h or until unrelated user action. Align with MindShift behavior.

findings.issue: Open debt DEBT-230: $230 AZN duplicate 83(b) filing loss unaddressed. Class 21 meta-failure pattern active.
findings.recommended_fix: Append journal entry, set intensity=5, update balance. Enforce ledger rule before next wake.

perspectives.raw: {"perspective": "Assessment Science", "findings": [{"severity": "P1", "file_or_area": "engine.py", "issue": "IRT 3PL parameters (a, b, c) may be guessed, not calibrated from real data", "recommended_fix": "Verify calibration of IRT parameters and estimate SEM impact if guessed"}, {"severity": "P2", "file_or_area": "question pool", "issue": "Question pool size per competency may be less than 15", "recommended_fix": "Increase question pool size to minimum 15 for CAT differentiation and 30+ for reliable theta estimation"}, {"severity": "P1", "file_or_area": "DIF analysis", "issue": "Potential bias against AZ/CIS test-takers in some questions", "recommended_fix": "Conduct thorough DIF analysis and adjust questions as needed"}, {"severity": "P2", "file_or_area": "CAT stopping rules", "issue": "SE threshold may not be appropriate", "recommended_fix": "Review and adjust SE threshold for optimal performance"}, {"severity": "P1", "file_or_area": "temporal decay", "issue": "180-day half-life may not be evidence-based", "recommended_fix": "Review research and adjust temporal decay rationale as needed"}], "overall_verdict": "warn", "whistleblower_flag": null}

findings.issue: IRT 3PL parameters (a, b, c) may be guessed, not calibrated from real data
findings.recommended_fix: Verify calibration of IRT parameters and estimate SEM impact if guessed

findings.issue: Question pool size per competency may be less than 15
findings.recommended_fix: Increase question pool size to minimum 15 for CAT differentiation and 30+ for reliable theta estimation

findings.issue: Potential bias against AZ/CIS test-takers in some questions
findings.recommended_fix: Conduct thorough DIF analysis and adjust questions as needed

findings.issue: SE threshold may not be appropriate
findings.recommended_fix: Review and adjust SE threshold for optimal performance

findings.issue: 180-day half-life may not be evidence-based
findings.recommended_fix: Review research and adjust temporal decay rationale as needed

findings.issue: Automated decision consent flow does not exist or is insufficient
findings.recommended_fix: Implement explicit consent flow for automated decisions

findings.issue: Current ToS may not cover AI-generated assessments
